message:
test(fwc): integrate generator with placeholder scanner and add smoke harness [24llg.7.4.2]

- Add generated_scaffolds_pass_placeholder_inventory_scan: loads the real
  placeholder-inventory.json, extracts runtime-blocker needles, and verifies
  no generated scaffold (all 10 archetypes) contains scanner-flagged content
- Add generator_smoke_harness_full_flow: exercises complete generate→precheck→
  metadata→verification flow for all archetypes, validating manifest ID/zone,
  scaffold_status, ConnectorErrorMapping, next_steps, and E2E test references
- Add generator_smoke_failure_diagnostic_ids_source: verifies precheck items
  have diagnostic IDs covering manifest and unsafe-code categories

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
